steps.title: Solve the unknown directly
steps.content:
The graph shows points such as $(-7,-2)$ and $(-5,-6)$ on the curve, and the model has the form $f(x)=\frac{a}{x+b}$. Substitute the two points:
$$-2=\frac{a}{-7+b}$$
$$-6=\frac{a}{-5+b}$$
These give $a=6$ and $b=4$, so $$f(x)=\frac{6}{x+4}.$$

steps.title: Match a choice
steps.content: Choice C is $g(x)=\frac{6}{x+8}$, so it matches the shifted function. C is correct.
